news-global-econ.title: Ben Sasse claims public schools were created to separate Catholic kids from parents, priests
news-global-econ.description: Former Sen. Ben Sasse says American public schools were designed to separate Catholic children from their parents and priests during a Trinity Forum event.

news-global-econ.title: Why America’s next 250 years can be greater than its first 250
news-global-econ.description: America's 250th anniversary recalls how George Washington's troops survived the Battle of Brooklyn in 1776 and how patriots persevered through centuries.

news-global-econ.title: World Series champion John Smoltz warns baseball 'will suffer' if ABS system is applied to all pitches
news-global-econ.description: Hall of Famer John Smoltz said he likes the ABS challenge system but is urging MLB to not make automated strike zones full-time in baseball.

news-global-econ.title: NATO's eastern flank races to rearm as Trump pressure exposes Western Europe's defense gap
news-global-econ.description: Eastern European NATO allies closest to Russia are spending the most on defense, while Western Europe faces pressure to meet the alliance's 5% GDP goal.

news-global-econ.title: Florida and Texas are battling for new residents. DeSantis thinks he found an advantage
news-global-econ.description: Gov. Ron DeSantis backs a constitutional amendment to expand Florida's homestead exemption to $250,000, potentially saving homeowners billions in taxes.

news-global-soc.title: Presbyterian Church faces internal revolt after proposing clergy must be in monogamous relationships
news-global-soc.description: The Presbyterian Church (U.S.A.) faces backlash after a proposed rule requiring clergy monogamy sparked outrage from progressive committees.

news-global-soc.title: #794 – NBA Finals Trivia with Bill Bradley | The Quiz
news-global-soc.description: In today’s episode of The Quiz, we’re testing your knowledge on everything from historic draft-day trades to legends who dominated the court before moving on to the halls of Congress. Can you answer these? Hardwood Nicknames: What 3rd overall pick in the 1970…

news-global-soc.title: Professional sports and media need to stop acting like Russian athletes are Putin puppets
news-global-soc.description: Russian athletes face flag bans and political scrutiny at 2026 French Open as Mirra Andreeva wins Roland Garros amid ongoing neutrality policies.

news-global-soc.title: World Cup stadium workers vote to authorize strike days before tournament citing ICE concerns
news-global-soc.description: SoFi Stadium workers voted to authorize a strike one week before the World Cup, citing stalled contract talks and fears over ICE presence at matches.

news-global-soc.title: Henry Nowak’s killing exposes Britain’s dangerous two-tier justice system
news-global-soc.description: Henry Nowak's stabbing death in England raises questions about woke police bias, two-tier policing and equity policies in British law enforcement.
